subtitle: Join our community of lifelong learners. Navigate the admissions process below.

steps.title: Online Registration
steps.description: Complete the preliminary online registration form with student and parent details to initiate the process.

steps.title: Document Verification
steps.description: Visit the school campus with original documents for verification by our admissions counselors.

steps.title: Interaction Session
steps.description: A brief, informal interaction between the student, parents, and the principal/coordinators.

steps.title: Fee Submission
steps.description: Upon selection, secure the admission by paying the requisite fee within the stipulated timeframe.
